prompt: Fix the HTTP client timeout handling

turns.content:
<task>
Fix the HTTP client — it hangs forever on slow responses because there's no timeout configured.
</task>

arguments.reasoning: Line 17: `&nethttp.Client{}` has no Timeout set, defaulting to 0 (no timeout). Need to add a configurable timeout. Standard practice is 30 seconds default.

turns.content:
=== RUN   TestGet
--- PASS: TestGet (0.00s)
=== RUN   TestGetTimeout
--- PASS: TestGetTimeout (0.05s)
=== RUN   TestNewClientWithTimeout
--- PASS: TestNewClientWithTimeout (0.00s)
PASS
ok  	gohttp/pkg/http	0.06s

arguments.summary: Fixed HTTP client timeout in pkg/http/client.go. Added 30s default timeout to NewClient() and new NewClientWithTimeout() for custom values. Was using zero timeout (infinite wait). All 3 tests pass including TestGetTimeout.
arguments.final_answer: Fixed HTTP client hanging by adding 30-second default timeout in pkg/http/client.go. Added NewClientWithTimeout() for custom timeout values. All 3 tests pass.
